review_reason: 4 sorries remain: 2 fuel decrease checks in strict_intermediate_exists, 2 in NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder reflexive cases. DenselyOrdered is resolved but depends on strict_intermediate_exists which has the fuel sorries.

artifacts.summary: Added strict_intermediate_exists theorem with well-founded iteration infrastructure. Resolved 4/6 original sorries in DenselyOrdered but introduced 2 fuel decrease sorries.
Implementation summary documenting changes, remaining sorries, and recommendations.

partial_progress.details: Implemented well-founded iteration infrastructure (strict_intermediate_exists). Resolved DenselyOrdered sorries using this lemma. NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder reflexive cases require different approach - need to prove timeline has non-trivial structure.

errors.message: Fuel decrease check requires proving subformula closure relationship between consecutive distinguishing formulas
errors.recommendation: Track distinguishing formulas explicitly and prove strict containment

errors.message: NoMaxOrder/NoMinOrder reflexive cases need proof that timeline has non-reflexive structure
errors.recommendation: Prove timeline has multiple equivalence classes using MCS distinctness argument
